data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying the following story done definitions:
- DD1: Outbound bridge PUTs dso.file_impact to /rest/api/3/issue/{key}/properties/dso.file_impact (handler calls set_issue_property)
- DD2: Outbound bridge posts a single formatted comment deduped by UUID marker via existing .jira-comment-map
- DD3: Inbound bridge does NOT read dso.file_impact as a ticket field (property lives outside fields.* — confirmed by absence of dso.file_impact in _inbound_api.py)
- DD5: Integration test confirms full outbound path (the RED tests from story b9ac-2459 go GREEN)

## TDD Requirement
RED integration tests already exist in tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py (story b9ac-2459). They test the full process_events() → FILE_IMPACT → set_issue_property + add_comment + BRIDGE_ALERT path via mock AcliClient. These 4 tests are currently RED (failing because no FILE_IMPACT handler exists). This task makes them GREEN.

## Implementation Notes

### 1. Add handle_file_impact_event() to plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_outbound_handlers.py

Follow handle_comment_event() as the reference pattern. Add after handle_edit_event():

```python
def handle_file_impact_event(
    event: dict[str, Any],
    *,
    acli_client: Any,
    tickets_root: Path,
    bridge_env_id: str,
    run_id: str = "",  # accepted for uniform ctx unpacking; not used
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """Handle a FILE_IMPACT event: PUT dso.file_impact property + deduped comment."""
    ticket_id = event.get("ticket_id", "")
    ticket_dir = tickets_root / ticket_id

    event_data = _read_event_file(event.get("file_path", ""))
    if not event_data:
        return []

    event_uuid = event_data.get("uuid", "")
    file_impact = event_data.get("data", {}).get("file_impact") or []
    event_env_id = event_data.get("env_id", "")

    # Echo prevention: skip events emitted by this bridge instance
    if event_env_id == bridge_env_id:
        return []

    # Resolve jira_key from latest SYNC event
    sync_files = sorted(ticket_dir.glob("*-SYNC.json"))
    if not sync_files:
        return []
    sync_data = _read_event_file(sync_files[-1])
    if not sync_data:
        return []
    jira_key = sync_data.get("jira_key", "")
    if not jira_key:
        return []

    # Dedup check: skip if this event UUID was already posted
    dedup_map = _read_dedup_map(ticket_dir)
    uuid_to_jira = dedup_map.get("uuid_to_jira_id", {})
    if event_uuid in uuid_to_jira:
        return []

    # PUT to Jira issue property (may raise — caught below for BRIDGE_ALERT)
    try:
        acli_client.set_issue_property(jira_key, "dso.file_impact", file_impact)
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.warning("FILE_IMPACT PUT failed for %s: %s", jira_key, exc)
        write_bridge_alert(
            ticket_dir=ticket_dir,
            ticket_id=ticket_id,
            reason="FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED",
            bridge_env_id=bridge_env_id,
        )
        return []

    # Post formatted comment with UUID marker for human visibility
    n_files = len(file_impact)
    paths = ", ".join(f.get("path", "") for f in file_impact[:5])
    if n_files > 5:
        paths += f", ... ({n_files - 5} more)"
    comment_body = f"File Impact ({n_files} file{'s' if n_files != 1 else ''}): {paths}"
    body_with_marker = embed_uuid_marker(comment_body, event_uuid)
    result = acli_client.add_comment(jira_key, body_with_marker)
    jira_comment_id = result.get("id", "") if isinstance(result, dict) else ""

    if jira_comment_id:
        jira_id_to_uuid = dedup_map.get("jira_id_to_uuid", {})
        uuid_to_jira[event_uuid] = jira_comment_id
        jira_id_to_uuid[jira_comment_id] = event_uuid
        dedup_map["uuid_to_jira_id"] = uuid_to_jira
        dedup_map["jira_id_to_uuid"] = jira_id_to_uuid
        _write_dedup_map(ticket_dir, dedup_map)

    return []
```

Key constraints:
- echo prevention: skip if event_env_id == bridge_env_id (same as handle_comment_event)
- dedup: check uuid_to_jira before calling set_issue_property or add_comment
- BRIDGE_ALERT: catch Exception from set_issue_property, write alert with reason=FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED, return early (do NOT post comment if PUT failed)
- dedup map: update ONLY after comment is successfully posted (same as handle_comment_event)
- Import write_bridge_alert from bridge._outbound_api (already imported in _outbound_handlers.py via _outbound_api)

### 2. Add FILE_IMPACT branch to bridge-outbound.py process_outbound()

In plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py, in the process_outbound() dispatcher loop, add after the EDIT branch:

```python
elif event_type == "FILE_IMPACT":
    handle_file_impact_event(event, **ctx)
```

Also update the import from bridge._outbound_handlers to include handle_file_impact_event.

### 3. Inbound bridge confirmation (DD3)
Grep plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_inbound_api.py for "dso.file_impact" — expect 0 matches (property lives outside fields.*). No code change needed; acceptance criterion verifies this.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_outbound_handlers.py (add handle_file_impact_event)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py (add FILE_IMPACT branch + import)

## Pattern Reference
# from plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_outbound_handlers.py (handle_comment_event — reference pattern)
def handle_comment_event(event, *, acli_client, tickets_root, bridge_env_id, run_id=""):
    ticket_id = event.get("ticket_id", "")
    ticket_dir = tickets_root / ticket_id
    event_data = _read_event_file(event.get("file_path", ""))
    if not event_data: return []
    event_uuid = event_data.get("uuid", "")
    event_env_id = event_data.get("env_id", "")
    if event_env_id == bridge_env_id: return []
    sync_files = sorted(ticket_dir.glob("*-SYNC.json"))
    if not sync_files: return []
    sync_data = _read_event_file(sync_files[-1])
    jira_key = sync_data.get("jira_key", "") if sync_data else ""
    if not jira_key: return []
    dedup_map = _read_dedup_map(ticket_dir)
    uuid_to_jira = dedup_map.get("uuid_to_jira_id", {})
    if event_uuid in uuid_to_jira: return []
    body_with_marker = embed_uuid_marker(comment_body, event_uuid)
    result = acli_client.add_comment(jira_key, body_with_marker)
    ...

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 RED integration tests in tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py now pass GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py -v 2>&1 | grep -E "passed" | grep -q .
- [ ] handle_file_impact_event is exported from bridge/_outbound_handlers.py
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "from plugins.dso.scripts.bridge._outbound_handlers import handle_file_impact_event"
- [ ] FILE_IMPACT branch wired in bridge-outbound.py process_outbound()
  Verify: grep "FILE_IMPACT" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py | grep -q handle_file_impact_event
- [ ] Inbound bridge has no reference to dso.file_impact (DD3 — property outside fields.*)
  Verify: grep -c "dso.file_impact" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_inbound_api.py | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] BRIDGE_ALERT written when set_issue_property raises (test_file_impact_emits_bridge_alert_on_put_failure passes)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py::test_file_impact_emits_bridge_alert_on_put_failure -v
- [ ] ruff check passes for modified files
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_outbound_handlers.py plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/_outbound_handlers.py plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py
data.title: Add handle_file_impact_event() to bridge handlers and wire FILE_IMPACT dispatcher branch
